creator: _jkrow
caption:
um WOW. I’ve spent almost a decade dreaming of this view in the Dolomites and can confidently say that it was so worth the trip 😭🤍🏔️ 

We are SO lucky to live in a world where places like this exist. 

#dolomiti #dolomites #italy

transcription.text: I'm the king of my own land
